## Summary

- Describe the motivation for this change.
- Highlight the user-visible or maintainer-visible impact.

## Changes

- List the main implementation changes.

## Testing

- [ ] `make fmt`
- [ ] `make vet`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make test-race` (if concurrency-related)

## Documentation

- [ ] `README.md` updated if public behavior changed
- [ ] Governance or support docs updated if contributor workflow changed

## Notes

- Call out risks, trade-offs, or follow-up work if applicable.
